name: CertiK
description: Blockchain security firm providing smart-contract audits, formal verification and the Skynet real-time on-chain risk monitoring API.

seo.title: CertiK — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: CertiK: Blockchain security firm providing smart-contract audits, formal verification and the Skynet real-time on-chain risk monitoring API.

when_to_use: Smart contract audit before DeFi protocol mainnet launch
Formal verification of token contract business logic
Skynet real-time on-chain risk monitoring for exchanges
Security score integration for NFT marketplace due diligence
Bridge contract vulnerability assessment for cross-chain apps

pros: Recognized brand gives audit reports strong market signal
Skynet API offers continuous on-chain risk monitoring
Formal verification available for high-value protocols
Large auditor team handles enterprise engagements fast
cons: Past audits of exploited protocols hurt credibility
Audit quality reportedly varies by assigned team
Pricing premium versus independent auditor collectives
Marketing-heavy positioning rubs serious researchers wrong
review.verdict: Well-known Web3 audit shop with broad services; quality depends on team, and the brand is polarizing.
review.best_for: Protocols that need a recognized brand stamp plus on-chain monitoring for compliance signaling.
review.not_for: Teams who prioritize researcher reputation over brand recognition on audit reports.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
